Time (h)	Temperature (K)	Fission rate (fiss / m3 s)	Hydrostatic stress (MPa)	Steam pressure (atm)	System pressure (Pa)	O (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	O2 (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	O3 (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	U (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	UO (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	UO2 (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	UO3 (gas, matrix) (mol/m3)	UO2:VA (ionic_liquid, matrix) (mol/m3)	U (ionic_liquid, matrix) (mol/m3)	O (ionic_liquid, matrix) (mol/m3)	UO3 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U4O9_S1 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U4O9_S2 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U4O9_S3 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U3O8_S1 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U3O8_S2 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U3O8_S3 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	U3O8_S4 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	TETRAGONAL_U (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	ORTHORHOMBIC_A20 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	FCC_A1 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	C1_MO2 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)	BCC_A2 (condensed, matrix) (mol/m3)
